COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Oct-23-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATEIDENCE OPCO, LLC D/B/A VICTORIAN POST ACUTE, BAY AREA MASTER TENANT LLC, PROVIDENCE GROUP, INC., PACS GROUP INC., AND PACS HOLDINGS, LLC's MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendants' unopposed motion to compel arbitration and stay civil action is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
